sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) hair (so called from the idea of shaving, see the root No. 2), Num 6:5 Eze 44:20.

(2) a leader, commander of an army, so called from his going before, see the root No. 3. Pl. פְּרָעֹו (compare as to the sex of nouns of office, Lehrg. 468, 878), Deu 32:42 Jud. 5:2 . Arab. فَرْعُ a prince, the head of a family.
